stemHtml: The flight director indicates you should turn to the right. What happens to the FD as you roll right?

options.a: Within 10 degrees of capturing the localiser, the flight director will switch to a left roll indication to help you level the aircraft.
options.b: It continues reading the exact same deviation until the localiser course is intercepted.
options.c: The deviation indication adjusts in proportion to the deviation of the localiser path.
options.d: It becomes centred if you exceed a 15 degree bank angle.
